CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255)) ON COMMIT DELETE ROWS;
CREATE GLOBAL TEMP TABLE temp_table2 (user_id INT, order_id INT) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table3 AS SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = TRUE WITH DATA;
CREATE LOCAL TEMP TABLE temp_table4 (product_id INT NOT NULL, quantity INT) ON COMMIT DELETE ROWS;
CREATE GLOBAL TEMP TABLE temp_table5 AS SELECT a.id, b.value FROM table_a a JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.a_id ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
CREATE LOCAL TEMP TABLE temp_table6 (first_name VARCHAR(100), last_name VARCHAR(100), CONSTRAINT unique_name UNIQUE (first_name, last_name)) ON COMMIT DELETE ROWS;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table7 AS SELECT id, SUM(amount) FROM transactions GROUP BY id ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
CREATE GLOBAL TEMP TABLE temp_table8 (category_id INT, description VARCHAR(255)) AS SELECT id, description FROM categories WHERE status = 'active' WITH DATA ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table9 (invoice_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
CREATE LOCAL TEMP TABLE temp_table10 (code VARCHAR(10) UNIQUE) ON COMMIT DELETE ROWS;
